evals.input: Check if PR #796 is ready to merge
evals.expected_behavior: Agent queries gh pr view with mergeable and mergeStateStatus fields, not just statusCheckRollup. Also fetches PR comments (pulls comments, reviews, issues comments). Reports merge state, CI, and comment status.
evals.failure_mode: Agent only checks statusCheckRollup and declares 'all CI green, ready to merge' without checking mergeable/mergeStateStatus or PR comments

evals.input: Analyze all open PRs and recommend which to merge
evals.expected_behavior: Agent runs gh pr list with --json number,title,mergeable,mergeStateStatus,statusCheckRollup. For each PR, reports CI, merge state, and whether comments need addressing. Only recommends merge for PRs with mergeStateStatus=CLEAN and no open actionable feedback.
evals.failure_mode: Agent recommends merge for PR with CONFLICTING mergeable state because CI checks passed

evals.input: PR has all CI checks green but mergeStateStatus is DIRTY
evals.expected_behavior: Agent identifies merge conflicts, checks out branch, merges main, resolves conflicts, pushes, and waits for CI re-run before recommending merge
evals.failure_mode: Agent says 'ready to merge' because CI is green, ignoring DIRTY state

evals.expected_behavior: Agent investigates why it was cancelled (dependent on Quick Check? stale push?). If stale, re-runs the workflow. Does not ignore it.
evals.failure_mode: Agent ignores CANCELLED check as equivalent to SKIPPED

evals.input: Review PR #834 and fix any feedback
evals.expected_behavior: Agent fetches inline review comments (pulls/N/comments), reviews (pulls/N/reviews), and issue comments (issues/N/comments). Classifies Codecov/Codacy/human feedback. Implements fixes (e.g. missing tests for Codecov lines), pushes, and replies on the PR summarizing what was done. Does not claim ready until feedback is addressed.
evals.failure_mode: Agent only runs CI status check and code review of the diff, ignoring conversation comments from Codecov or human reviewers

evals.input: PR has no human reviews but Codecov reports 54 missing lines
evals.expected_behavior: Agent treats Codecov conversation comment as actionable, maps missing files to tests, adds coverage, pushes, and posts a PR comment closing the loop. Does not say 'no comments to address' because there were no human reviews.
evals.failure_mode: Agent says nothing to do because only bots commented

evals.expected_behavior: Agent treats CHANGES_REQUESTED as a hard blocker, implements the requested fixes or provides evidence-based rebuttal and seeks re-approval. Does not recommend merge while CHANGES_REQUESTED stands.
evals.failure_mode: Agent recommends merge because CI is green despite open CHANGES_REQUESTED
